pi_items.source: Found explicitly in export_result.sh, setup_task.sh, and task.json instructions
Found explicitly in export_result.sh, setup_task.sh, and task.json instructions
Task instructions explicitly request a 5x5 sampling grid, yielding 25 expected grid points
Verifier logic checks row_count, valid_normals, and valid_eulers against a threshold of 20 for full points

privileged_info_summary: I confirmed that the task operates in a synthetic CoppeliaSim environment and requires the programatic generation of a scan path over an agent-created primitive sphere. Verified that the expected 5x5 sampling grid size (25 points), minimum required waypoints (20), and exact output paths explicitly match the task description instructions, setup scripts, and verifier logic.
